help_pity:
> 🛡 **Pity System**
> Guarantees a card drop on a specific roll:
> 🔵 **Rare** (6th) | 🟣 **Epic** (18th) | 🟡 **Legendary** (40th) | 🔴 **Mythic (shard)** (80th)

sets_empty: Oops! Your inventory is empty. Use /roll to get cards!
sets_list_title:
📚 **Your Collections (Sets)**
Collect all cards of the same theme to claim a reward and unlock a unique Buff!
help_sets:
📚 **Collections & Buffs**

Cards in the game are grouped into thematic sets. Completing a full collection unlocks access to unique bonuses!

🎁 **Reward:** As soon as you collect all cards in a set, you will receive a large bonus in 🪙 **Points**.

✨ **Buffs:** For each completed set, you unlock a unique Buff. This is a passive boost that increases the **Power** of your cards in duels.

⚙️ **How to use:**
1. Go to `/profile`.
2. Press the **“📚 Collections”** button.
3. Select a completed set and press **“✨ Equip”**.

⚠️ *Important: only one Buff can be active at a time!*
